steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The key phrase is “comparatively little notice,” explicitly describing how much attention below sea level research has received. The “though” structure signals that high altitude research must be characterized as the opposite of this neglect.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Copious means abundant and plentiful, establishing that high altitude research is extensive and well-studied. Preliminary, sporadic, and equivocal fail to establish the quantity-based distinction the contrast requires. That matches choice D — D is correct.
